projects.title: Firmware Analysis Tool
projects.subtitle: Python (PySide6, FastAPI, Bash)
projects.description: A professional desktop toolkit for secure, non-destructive firmware analysis of Android/Linux images, featuring a modular Python backend and robust UI.
features: Hybrid PySide6 UI with modular Python backend for extensibility
Automated extraction pipeline (lpunpack, payload-dumper-go) for partitioned .img files
Read-only mounting with secure sudo prompt and user isolation
Custom command execution with output logging for traceability
Workspace-driven management of extracted, mounted, and analyzed data
Scalable backend modules: extractor, mounter, analyzer, archiver
Emphasis on safe, non-destructive inspection and filesystem analysis

projects.title: AI Personal Assistant
projects.subtitle: Flutter, Dart, Gemini API, Firebase
projects.description: A mobile-first AI assistant app with chat, live news, YouTube, and a knowledge hub — built for offline-first use and real-time sync.
features: Conversational Gemini AI chat with context-aware responses
YouTube and Live News integration for seamless media consumption
Knowledge hub with categorized notes: Code, Theory, CMDs, Patterns
Google Notes sync and multi-language support
Offline-first architecture with Firebase Firestore real-time sync
Modular navigation and persistent dark mode

projects.title: PayrollGenix
projects.subtitle: React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, JWT
projects.description: A secure, scalable payroll management system with full CRUD, JWT authentication, role-based access, and automated salary workflows.
features: Full CRUD for employees, payroll, and roles
JWT authentication and granular role-based access
RESTful Express.js APIs with MongoDB persistence
Automated salary calculation and email notifications
CI/CD deployment on Vercel for rapid updates

projects.title: AI Personal Notes
projects.subtitle: React, Firebase, Python, Gemini API
projects.description: An AI-powered notes app with live context extraction, Gemini/Wikipedia integration, and real-time sync for smarter note-taking.
features: Live context extraction and smart note suggestions
Gemini and Wikipedia APIs for intelligent data generation
Firebase Authentication and Firestore for secure, real-time sync
Python backend for automated news extraction and summarization

projects.title: SnapCart
projects.subtitle: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Multer, EJS
projects.description: A lightweight image catalogue for eCommerce with secure uploads, server-side rendering, and robust XSS protection.
features: Secure file/image uploads with Multer
EJS templating for fast server-side rendering
Input validation and XSS protection for data security
Optimized for small business product listings

projects.title: Seasons Garden
projects.subtitle: PHP, MySQL, Bootstrap, SMTP
projects.description: A feature-rich eCommerce site for farming tools and nursery products with OTP login, dynamic listings, and a secure admin panel.
features: OTP-based email authentication using SMTP
Dynamic product listing and admin panel (PHP/MySQL)
Responsive UI with Bootstrap for all devices
